description:
You are a DevSecOps engineer who must “codify” an organization-wide policy that all Linux hosts run in the UTC time zone and use the en_US.UTF-8 locale. 
    The compliance pipeline looks for the presence and exact contents of three files inside a Git-style working directory at

        /home/user/devsecops-config

    Your job is to create those three files with the exact contents shown below, nothing more and nothing less.

    1. Create the subdirectory:
           /home/user/devsecops-config/time-locale
       (create any missing parent directories as well).

    2. Inside that subdirectory, create a file named **01-timezone.conf** whose entire contents are exactly (including the newline at the end):

           ZONE="UTC"
           UTC=true

       Notes:
       • There must be a single trailing newline after the last line.
       • No leading or trailing spaces on any line.

    3. In the same directory, create a file named **02-locale.conf** whose entire contents are exactly (including the newline at the end):

           LANG=en_US.UTF-8
           LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8

    4. Finally, record the change in a centrally-parsed log file located at

           /home/user/devsecops-config/change-log.txt

       Append (or create if it does not yet exist) exactly ONE line with this fixed content and the terminating newline:

           2024-01-01T00:00:00Z | devsecops-bot | Enforced timezone UTC and locale en_US.UTF-8

       Do not add any other text, timestamps or spaces.

    Summary of required file paths and their exact contents (each ends with a single newline):

    • /home/user/devsecops-config/time-locale/01-timezone.conf
      └── ZONE="UTC"
          UTC=true

    • /home/user/devsecops-config/time-locale/02-locale.conf
      └── LANG=en_US.UTF-8
          LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8

    • /home/user/devsecops-config/change-log.txt
      └── 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z | devsecops-bot | Enforced timezone UTC and locale en_US.UTF-8

    After creating the files, you can list the directory or cat the files to verify, but make sure the three artifacts above **exist exactly as specified** because the automated grader will check them byte-for-byte.
truth:
Expected final state (each file ends with a trailing newline character “\n”):

    1. Path: /home/user/devsecops-config/time-locale/01-timezone.conf
       Content (length = 24 bytes):
           ZONE="UTC"\n
           UTC=true\n

    2. Path: /home/user/devsecops-config/time-locale/02-locale.conf
       Content (length = 32 bytes):
           LANG=en_US.UTF-8\n
           LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8\n

    3. Path: /home/user/devsecops-config/change-log.txt
       Content (length = 83 bytes):
           2024-01-01T00:00:00Z | devsecops-bot | Enforced timezone UTC and locale en_US.UTF-8\n
name: task_000000_445ffa88
